titleStmt.title: SII 34.39: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 39. Tiruppanandāḷ, Kumbakonam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the first prākāra of the Arjunajaṭēśvara temple.

summary.p: Gift of money by a Nachchiṉāṟkkiṉiyāṉ alias Poṟkōyil-Pichchaṉ to the temple at Tiruppanandāḷ in Maṇṇi-nāḍu in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu on the north bank for bathing the deity daily in pañcha-gavya. Several Śvabrāhmaṇas received the money with promise to maintain the service as stipulated.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirupuvaṉa cakkaravarttikaḷ maturaikoṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulOttuṅka cOḻa tEvarkku yāṇṭu 9 virutarāca payaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇi nāṭṭu tirupparantāḷ Uṭaiyār tirutāṭakai Īśvararamuṭaiyār kOyili
l Āticaṇṭēśvara tēvakaṉmikaḷukkum palmākēśvaraṟkum Ikkōyilil civa brāhmaṇar kaucikaṉ Āṇṭāṉ tēvaṉum kaucikaṉ tiruveṇkāvuṭaiyāṉuṭaiya piḷḷaiyum bhāradvāji tēvaṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉu
m kāśyapaṉ periya cōtimēyaṉum Ātrayaṉ tēvanicaṉum kāśyapaṉ Āraṇampa poruḷ maṇṇikkarai maruntu kāśyapaṉ Āṉa pātam tēvaṉu kāśyapaṉ Āḻvāṉ kuṇacēkaraṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum Ivvaṉaivōm Eṅkaḷ kottiluḷḷārō(e)ṅ
kūṭa muppatu vaṭṭattu Upaiyaṅkoṇṭu Upaiyattiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Ittēvarkku pañcagavyam Āṭi Aruḷacceya Aippaci māsattu nacciṉāṟkkiṉiyāṉāṉa poṟkōyil piccaṉ kuṭutta kācu 100 2 10 ṉākupacu Āṟum citti
raimāsattukuṭuttakācu 2 100 2 10ṉāl pacu nālum Ākakkācu muṉṉūṟṟuṉālpatiṉāl pacu pattum kaikkoṇṭu cantirātittavarai Ivaiyiṟṟukku vēṇṭu rakṣai paṇṇi Ivaiyiṟṟil vanta Ilāccetaṅkaḷ Aṉupōvittu pañca gavyam Āṭi Aruḷa nāḷ 1 kku neyuḻakkum tayir Uriyum pālamutu vuḻakkum cāṇākac cāṟu nāḻiyum kōmuttiram nāḻi Uriyumāka celuttak kaṭavōmākavum Eṅkaḷ kāṇi Aṉupōvikka pra �ttamuṭaiyārum koḷvārum Ippaṭi U
paiyaṅ celuttak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Upaittīṭṭukkuṭuttōm Āticaṇṭēśvara tēvarkaṉmikaḷukkum paṉmāheśvarukkum Ivvaṉaivōm Ivarkaḷ colla Ivvupayattīṭṭu Eḻutiṉēṉ parantāḷuṭaiyāṉ civatavaṉa muṭai
yāṉ Eḻuttu Itu kauciyakaṉ Āṇṭāṉ tēvaṉāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyiravaṉ sajñaiyāṉamaikku Ivai vaṭapōcaṉ Irāmapirāṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāśyapaṉ mēyaṉāṉa poṟkōyil piccaṉ Eḻuttu Itu Āttirayaṉ tēva
ṉīcaṉāṉa tillai nāyakapaṭṭaṉ sajñaiyāṉamaikku veḷḷaivāraṇapiccaṉ Eḻuttu Itu kāśyapan Āḻvān kuṇacēkaran tēvaṉāṉa Ālāla cuntarabhaṭan samijñaiyānamaikku Ikkōyil śaivvācāriyakkāṇiyuṭaiya
yan nīṟaṇintān tillai varabhaṭṭanṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāśyapaṉ Āraṇap poruḷ maṇṇikkaraiy maruntāṉa tiruttāṭakai Īśvarapaṭṭaṉṉeḻuttu Itu bhāradvāja tēvan Āḷuṭaiyān bhaṭṭa samijñaiyānamaikku tiruppaṉantāḷu
ṭaiyāraiy pūjikku vaṉṉeḻuttu Īśvarabhaṭṭar makan śvetavaṉavāsi bhaṭṭanṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāśyapaṉ Āṇṭapātam tēvanpiḷḷaiyāḻvi Eḻuttu Itu kauvicayaṉ Uṭaiya piḷḷaiy sajñaiyāṉamaikku pūjikku mahādevabhaṭṭaṉ ṉeḻuttuḥ—
Digital edition of SII 34.39 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
